docHints.overview: Routing spine for the Horror.Place VM-constellation. Binds objectKind + tier + repo triples to schemas, invariants, metrics, and CHATDIRECTOR phases. This instance is intentionally minimal and GitHub-safe.

moodContract.summary: Atmosphere and tone contracts that set target invariant and entertainment metric bands for a region or sequence.
moodContract.usage: Authored early in design to define how a space should feel. Consumed by engine selectors and geometry/lighting controllers.

eventContract.summary: Region-bound horror event contracts defining triggers, pacing, and invariant/metric effects.
eventContract.usage: Used primarily in Atrocity-Seeds and Spectral-Foundry as Tier 2 vault content. Schemas live here; instances live in private repos.

regionContractCard.summary: Canonical region cards defining CIC, MDI, AOS, RRM, FCF, SPR, RWF, DET, HVF, LSG, SHCI bands plus target entertainment metrics.
regionContractCard.usage: Anchor for history-aware horror; referenced by seeds, styles, and runtime selectors.

seedContractCard.summary: Procedural story seeds that glue regions, personas, events, and invariants together.
seedContractCard.usage: Authored in Atrocity-Seeds as Tier 2 vault content using schemas defined here.

mathConstraints.description: Derived SPR band must be consistent with declared CIC, MDI, AOS, and FCF bands.
Tier-specific allowed bands for UEC, EMD, STCI, CDL, ARR for moodContract.
Maximum DET band per tier for regionContractCard, with stricter caps in T1-core than T2-vault.

objectKinds.name: moodContract
objectKinds.description: Atmospheric mood contract that specifies invariant and entertainment metric targets for a region or sequence.

docHints.summary: Canonical Tier 1 schema authority for mood contracts. No raw horror; contract-only.
docHints.usage: Define or evolve schemas and examples for mood contracts here. Instances of moods live in private repos.

docHints.summary: Vault implementation of concrete mood contracts.
docHints.usage: Use this route when authoring actual mood instances bound to regions and styles.

objectKinds.name: eventContract
objectKinds.description: Region-bound event contract capturing triggers, pacing, and invariant/metric adjustments.

docHints.summary: Vault route for concrete horror events bound to regions and seeds.
docHints.usage: Use when authoring encounter-level events that reference region cards and seeds. Schemas remain in Constellation-Contracts.

objectKinds.name: regionContractCard
objectKinds.description: Canonical region card defining invariant bands and target entertainment metrics for a geographical or conceptual region.

docHints.summary: Tier 1 schema authority for region cards and example contracts.
docHints.usage: Define invariant and metric structures for regions here. Concrete region rows live in private repos.

docHints.summary: Vault route for concrete region cards tied to historical data.
docHints.usage: Use when encoding actual geographic or archive-backed regions with real invariant bands.

objectKinds.name: seedContractCard
objectKinds.description: Procedural story seed that binds regions, personas, events, and invariants into reusable encounter patterns.

docHints.summary: Vault route for procedural horror seeds.
docHints.usage: Use when authoring PCG seeds that will be realized by Codebase-of-Death and governed by Dead-Ledger.
